messages.content: paraphrase this: Hi Mr Abdulrahman. As Nabil wil leave outside Riyadh, I need to get his temporary laptop as it belongs to Milestone. We have laptop here that belongs to Nudhum so I will prepare for him. If there's delay on payment on Nabil's laptop maybe it's under Finance, but we have already made a purchase request. If we got his laptop, we can prepare it and ship it to Shuqaiq via DHL.

Hello Mr. Abdulrahman. Since Nabil will be departing Riyadh, I need to collect his provisional laptop since it is property of Milestone. We possess a laptop here that is owned by Nudhum, which I will arrange for him. There might be a payment delay for Nabil's laptop, likely an issue with Finance, but a purchase order has been submitted. Once we receive his laptop, we can get it ready and send it to Shuqaiq through DHL.

paraphrase this: paraphrase this: Hi Mr Abdulrahman. As Nabil wil leave outside Riyadh, I need to get his temporary laptop as it belongs to Milestone. We have laptop here that belongs to Nudhum (Mohamed Ibrahim al-Askary but he has not got it yet) so I will prepare for him. If there’s delay on payment on Nabil’s laptop maybe it’s under Finance, but we have already made a purchase request. If we got his laptop, we can prepare it and ship it to Shuqaiq via DHL.

Hello Mr. Abdulrahman. Since Nabil is going to leave Riyadh, I must retrieve his interim laptop because it is the property of Milestone. We also have a laptop intended for Nudhum (Mohamed Ibrahim al-Askary), who hasn’t received it yet, which I will get ready. There might be a delay in the payment for Nabil's laptop, possibly due to Finance, but we've already placed a purchase order. Upon receiving his laptop, we will set it up and dispatch it to Shuqaiq through DHL.
paraphrase this: There might be a delay in the payment for Nabil’s laptop,but it's already processing by Finance.
The payment for Nabil’s laptop might experience a delay, but Finance is already processing it.
paraphrase this: After restarting the printer, printer starts to print again.

paraphrase this: Hi Nasser, can u provide service of repairing printer?
